title: What to know about the common cold before using medicinal herbs
intro: Herbal teas offer a natural and comforting relief for the common cold. Three standout choices include chamomile, ginger, and echinacea teas. Chamomile's soothing properties ease sore throats, while ginger's spicy flavor fights inflammation and congestion. Echinacea tea boosts the immune system, helping the body recover from cold symptoms faster. Regularly sipping these teas brings comfort and supports quicker healing.
definition: The common cold is a viral infection that typically affects the nose, throat, and upper respiratory tract. It is caused by over 200 different viruses, with rhinoviruses being the most common. Although it is often considered a minor ailment, the common cold remains significant as it is the most frequent infectious disease in humans, leading to millions of lost work and school days each year. Moreover, while it primarily affects the upper respiratory system, it can lower the body's resistance, making an individual more susceptible to secondary infections like pneumonia, bronchitis, and ear infections.
